top_signals.title: Caspian Pipeline Consortium Halts Loadings on Drone Strike
top_signals.summary: Oil loading at the Caspian Pipeline Consortium’s terminal on Russia’s Black Sea coast was suspended after a drone strike, prompting the Kazakh government to call for an immediate end to such attacks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Guidance: Royal Mint Trading Fund: framework document
top_signals.summary: This document sets out the accountabilities and relationships between the Royal Mint Trading Fund, the Shareholder (HM Treasury) and the Shareholder Representative (UK Government Investments).
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Senator calls on Rubio, Blanche to push back against Canadian surveillance legislation
top_signals.summary: Democratic Sen. Ron Wyden says the Trump administration should pressure Canada not to enact a proposal that would "weaponize American technology infrastructure" for surveillance purposes.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Japan to provide patrol boats to Cambodia in first OSA
top_signals.summary: Cambodia will receive aid under the OSA program, which provides defense equipment free of charge to like-minded countries.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
